LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT METROPOLIS OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL, WITHOUT PREJUDICE, OF DEFENDANT METROPOLIS OF SAN FRANCISCO FILED ON MAY 29, 2014. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ST. BASIL'S GREEK ORTHODOX CHURCH OF STOCKTON'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE (CCP SEC 397(C)) IS GRANTED. ON JUNE 24, 2014, PLAINTIFF FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE. VENUE IS TRANSFERRED TO SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302)
